title: SHOP how-to guides, fact sheets, tools, and other resources for employers
main-title: How to enroll in SHOP insurance
meta-description: Guides, tools, fact sheets and other resources for the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP)
bite: Resources to help small businesses and non-profits enroll in and use SHOP health insurance
excerpt:
For help with the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP), check out these resources:

SHOP eligibility & prices

  • The Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) Calculator: Find out if SHOP is right for your business
  • Find SHOP plans & prices
  • Minimum Participation Rate Calculator: Find out if you meet the participation requirement

The Small Business Health Care Tax Credit

  • The Small Business Health Care Tax Credit Estimator: Check if you may qualify for a tax credit and how much it may be worth

Applying & enrolling in SHOP insurance

  • Employer Guide to SHOP Insurance (PDF, 211 KB).

Working with SHOP-registered agents and brokers

  • Find Local Help

Choosing health insurance plans

  • Resources for small businesses
  • Health Reimbursement Arrangement decision guide

Questions?

  • Contact the SHOP Call Center at 1-800-706-7893 (TTY: 1-888-201-6445).
